Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR across all rejected cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in re-submission loops
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the case reaches the supervisor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a prior rejection by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a prior approval by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in cases that are later resubmitted versus those that terminate after rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that loop back to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Request Payment to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in erroneous or anomalous traces (if any)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between consecutive occurrences of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in multi-rejection loops
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by org:resource of the supervisor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of org:resource
